Season 1 Week 1 – Mar 17 – Heroic Week
Do not spend any Crests until told to do so
Do LFR for tier pieces (check guide for why)
Complete a World Tour of M0 dungeons - rewards champ ilvl
Complete 4x Nightmare Prey for Champion gear and renown.
Kill World Boss for champ 2/6 250 ilvl item
If available, complete pvp quest for guaranteed hero neck/ring
Do t8 bountiful delves with coffer keys, use map on t8+ delve
Before raid, craft 2x 246 ilvl pieces, 2x embellishments on weak slots, use 160 Vet Crests
Before raid, spend all Adventurer, Veteran and Champion Crests upgrading anything
Track crests: 0/100 Heroic, 0/100 Mythic
Week 2 – Mar 24 – Mythic Week, M+ Opens, take off work giganerds
Do not spend any Crests until told to do so
1h crafted note, check guide, check craft path info(VERY IMPORTANT!)
Do LFR for tier pieces (check guide for why)
(Optional) Kill World Boss for champ 2/6 250 ilvl item
(Optional) Complete 4x Nightmare Prey for Champion gear and renown.
Do at least one t11 bountiful delve to get Cracked Keystone Quest
Continue to spend all Adventurer, Veteran and Champion Crests upgrading anything
Farm +10s for 266 gear in every slot
Before Mythic raid, Upgrade 11x 3/6 hero items once each
Mythic: If you're lucky and got a Myth track item, skip to next week's upgrade advice for it.
Track crests: 220/220 Heroic, 0/220 Mythic - never hold Mythic crests
Ending item level: 4x266, 11x269
Week 3 – Mar 31 – Final Raid Opens
Open vault (272+ myth item) - upgrade after crafting
Craft items - see guide for 2 paths to pick
If no 4p, do LFR for tier pieces (check guide for why)
Farm +10s for vault + crests
Heroic: Upgrade 2 of your 4/6 269 items to 6/6 276 for 80 Heroic Crests
Mythic: If your vault item was 1/6, upgrade its heroic counterpart first to 6/6 heroic for 20 Heroic Crests. Upgrade your 1/6 272 Myth track item to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
If you got a 2nd myth track item, skip to next week's upgrade advice for it.
Track crests: 320/320 Heroic, 160/320 Mythic - never hold Mythic crests
Ending item level: 3x266, 8x269, 2x276h, 1x285(crafted), 1x289
Week 4 – Apr 7
Open vault (272+ myth item)
Farm +10s for vault + crests
Heroic: Upgrade 2 of your 4/6 269 items to 6/6 276 for 80 Heroic Crests
Mythic: If your vault item was 1/6, upgrade its heroic counterpart first to 6/6 heroic for 20 Heroic Crests. Upgrade your 1/6 272 Myth track item to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
Mythic: Upgrade your raid drop from 2/6 275 Myth track to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
Track crests: 420/400 Heroic, 320/420 Mythic - never hold Mythic crests
Ending item level: 2x266, 5x269, 4x276h, 1x285(crafted), 3x289
Week 5 – Apr 14
Open vault (272+ myth item)
Farm +10s for vault + crests
Craft next item (see doc for more info)
Heroic: Upgrade 2 of your 4/6 269 items to 6/6 276 for 80 Heroic Crests
Mythic: If your vault item was 1/6, upgrade its heroic counterpart first to 6/6 heroic for 20 Heroic Crests. Upgrade your 1/6 272 Myth track item to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
Track crests: 520/520 Heroic, 480/520 Mythic - never hold Mythic crests
Ending item level:  1x266, 2x269, 6x276h, 2x285(crafted), 4x289
Week 6 – Apr 21 - Done with Heroic Crests
Open vault (272+ myth item)
Farm +10s for vault + crests
Heroic: Upgrade your last 4/6 269 item to 6/6 276 for 40 Heroic Crests
Mythic: If your vault item was 1/6, upgrade its heroic counterpart first to 6/6 heroic for 20 Heroic Crests. Upgrade your 1/6 272 Myth track item to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
Mythic: Upgrade your raid drop from 2/6 275 Myth track to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
Track crests: 560/620 Heroic, 620/620 Mythic - never hold Mythic crests
Ending item level:  7x276h, 2x285(crafted), 1x 285, 5x289
Week 7 – Apr 28+
Do not craft if you can get vault items higher than 1/6
Upgrade Mythic items as you get them, preferring to jump them to 289 for the +4 jump
Plan for possible 1H + crafted OH swap
Enjoy Blizzard's much better upgrade system!
